---
title: "Jessie Jones-Bateman"
---

## Jessie Jones-Bateman

**Dates:** (b. 1849/50)

**Maiden name:** (Burlton)

### Description

wife of Rowland Jones-Bateman

### Letters

- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- Letter from Feb 3 1900
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from April 11th 1895
- Letter from Novr 8th 1875
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from Decr 19 [[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
